title: narcissus linnaeanus subsp. intermedius
intro: Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. intermedius, also known as the intermediate bulbous narcissus, is a perennial plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant contains alkaloids, specifically galantamine, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. intermedius include potential treatment for Alzheimer's disease and other neurodegenerative disorders, as well as relief from pain and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tinctures, and extracts, but its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions with medications.
